subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from Our presence unto him who hath drawn nigh unto the Most Great Ocean and desired to turn toward the Ancient Horizon, whence the Sun hath shone forth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن تقرب الی البحر الاعظم و اراد ان یتوجه الی افق القدم الذی منه اشرقت شمس
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @honesty; truthfulness; trustworthiness, @suffering and imprisonment, @thankfulness; gratitude
